notes: Green fees are seasonal on the official website (kbscgolf.com): Jan-May weekday 600 THB, weekend 1,200 THB; Jun-Nov weekday 600 THB, weekend 1,000 THB; Dec weekday 1,000 THB, weekend 2,000 THB. 1golf.eu reports flat 1,000/2,000 THB — may reflect peak season. Caddie (300 THB) and cart (700 THB) confirmed from official website as available, but mandatory status not explicitly stated. GPS coordinates from travelmyth.ie (14.03076, 101.66471) cross-referenced with golfbangkok.com address (Na Khaem / Wang Dan, Kabin Buri).

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: Seasonal rate Jan-Nov (off-peak). Dec rate rises to 1,000 THB weekday. 1golf.eu shows flat 1,000 THB — may reflect peak season only.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: Jan-May weekend rate. Jun-Nov drops to 1,000 THB; Dec rises to 2,000 THB. 1golf.eu shows flat 2,000 THB.

caddie_required.note: golfdigg.com lists caddie as required (300 THB). Recommend direct confirmation.

cart_required.note: golfdigg.com lists cart as required (700 THB). Recommend direct confirmation.

phone.note: Official website lists 037-283-888. Additional numbers: 082-486-3631, 082-486-3633. 1golf.eu lists +66 37 290 345.

longitude.note: Cross-referenced with golfbangkok.com which gives lat/lng as 14.026388, 101.662762 — both sources consistent for Wang Dan, Kabin Buri location.

drive_time_from_bangkok_min.note: No source explicitly states drive time. 160 km from Bangkok at typical Thai highway speeds ~2.5 hours estimated. Recommend verification.

google_maps_url.note: No direct Google Maps CID URL found. Address: 196 Moo 11, Suwannasorn Rd, Wang Dan, Kabin Buri District, Prachin Buri 25110.
